title: xylothamia diffusa
intro: Xylothamia diffusa, also known as Senecio inaequidens, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Xylothamia diffusa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to increase urine production. Xylothamia diffusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and in some cases, it may also be used externally as a paste or salve for topical application.
